docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 78233931) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAG MANAGEMENT, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78339148), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAG MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED JAN-27-2026, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT KNUCKLES, JEFFREY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAG MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNUCKLES, JEFFREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 TURK STREET, #317, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78548279)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAG MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KNUCKLES, JEFFREY DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KNUCKLES, JEFFREY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KNUCKLES, JEFFREY
